title: State Bank of India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: State Bank of India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the State Bank of India Digital Technologies family as a Credit Analyst in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
